channel.title: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations
channel.description: The Rest of the Record feed: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 14 EAST 127 STREET, Apt BASEME, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
HMC ADM CODE: § 27-2017.4 ABATE THE INFESTATION CONSISTING OF ROACHES IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT BASEME, 1st APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2050 VALENTINE AVENUE, Apt 5C, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 HMC: PROPERLY REPAIR OR REPLACE THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE LOWER WINDOW SASH CAUSING GUILLOTINE EFFECT AT WINDOW LEADING TO FIRE ESCAPE IN THE 2nd ROOM FROM EAST LOCATED AT APT 5C, 5th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM EAST AT SOUTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 234 EAST 106 STREET, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 HMC: PROPERLY REPAIR OR REPLACE THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE LOCKING DEVICE AT BUILDING ENTRANCE DOOR

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 470 STRATFORD ROAD, Apt 5A, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE REPAIR THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE PLASTERED SURFACES AND PAINT IN A UNIFORM COLOR AT CEILING AND EAST WALL IN THE 2nd ROOM FROM NORTH LOCATED AT APT 5A, 5th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 530 WEST 123 STREET, Apt 4, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.6 ADM CODE - CORRECT THE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARD - PAINT THAT TESTED POSITIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT AND THAT IS PEELING OR ON A DETERIORATED SUBSURFACE - USING WORK PRACTICES SET FORTH IN 28 RCNY §11-06(B)(2) 1st DOOR FRAME FROM EAST AT SOUTH WALL IN THE PRIVATE HALLWAY LOCATED AT APT 4, 2nd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 3004 HEATH AVENUE, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2033 ADM CODE PROVIDE READY ACCESS TO BUILDINGS HEATING SYSTEM DOOR LOCKED AT BASEMENT

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 265 EAST 181 STREET, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 HMC: PROPERLY REPAIR OR REPLACE THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE LOWER GLASS PANE WINDOW AT INTERMEDIATE LANDING BETWEEN 3RD AND 4TH STORY AT PUBLIC HALL, 4th STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 265 EAST 181 STREET, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 HMC: PROPERLY REPAIR OR REPLACE THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE ELECTRIC STRIKE PLATE AT BUILDING ENTRANCE DOOR AT PUBLIC HALL, 1st STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1555 NOSTRAND AVENUE, Apt 2E, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 HMC: PROPERLY REPAIR OR REPLACE THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE SPRING BALANCE AT LOWER WINDOW SASH. 3RD FROM SOUTH AT WEST IN THE 2nd ROOM FROM NORTH LOCATED AT APT 2E, 2nd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1555 NOSTRAND AVENUE, Apt 2D, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
HMC ADM CODE: § 27-2017.4 ABATE THE INFESTATION CONSISTING OF MICE IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 2D, 2nd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM EAST AT SOUTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2008 HUGHES AVENUE, Apt 4D, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2070 ADM CODE PROVIDE AN ADEQUATE SUPPLY OF GAS TO THE FIXTURES AT RANGE IN THE KITCHEN LOCATED AT APT 4D, 4th STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1087 LENOX ROAD, Apt 511, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2031 ADM CODE PROVIDE HOT WATER AT ALL HOT WATER FIXTURES IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 511, 5th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM EAST AT SOUTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1904 VYSE AVENUE, Apt 9L, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE & 309 M/D LAW ABATE THE NUISANCE CONSISTING OF HOT WATER EXCEEDING MAXIMUM ALLOW TEMP. OF 130 DEGREES IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 9L, 9th STORY, 3rd APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST , SECTION ''WEST''

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1904 VYSE AVENUE, Apt 8C, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 27-2007, 27-2041.1 HMC, §238, § 309; § 107 (2) ( C) MDL AND 28 RCNY §25-171: REPLACE OR REPAIR THE SELF-CLOSING DOORS THAT IS MISSING OR DEFECTIVE HINGES IN THE ENTRANCE LOCATED AT APT 8C, 8th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST , SECTION ''EAST''

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 825 EAST 179 STREET, Apt 4E, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... GREATER THAN 30 SQ. FT. AT ALL WALLS AND CEILING IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT 4E, 4th STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 825 EAST 179 STREET, Apt 4E, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 27-2007, 27-2041.1 HMC, §238, § 309; § 107 (2) ( C) MDL AND 28 RCNY §25-171: REPLACE OR REPAIR THE SELF-CLOSING DOORS THAT IS MISSING OR DEFECTIVE LATCH IN THE ENTRANCE LOCATED AT APT 4E, 4th STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 825 EAST 179 STREET, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 2007 ADM CODE REMOVE THE ILLEGAL FASTENING LOCKABLE SLIDE BOLT AT 1ST VESTIBULE DOOR FROM SOUTH AT WEST , 1st STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 51 COURSEN PLACE, STATEN ISLAND
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 2007 ADM CODE REMOVE DEVICE PREVENTING DOOR FROM BEING SELF-CLOSING CONSISTING OF WOOD WEDGE AT FIRE DOOR TO STAIRS AT PUBLIC HALL, 2nd STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2532 UNIVERSITY AVENUE, Apt 2G, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
567 (C) § 27-2017, 27-2017.1, 27-2017.4, 27-2017.5, 27-2017.8, 27-2019, 27-2021 HMC: ABATE THE NUISANCE CONSISTING OF EVIDENCE OF RATS AND ALL UNDERLYING CAUSES CREATING THE PEST INFESTATIONS, BY USING INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT (IPM), ELIMINATE ALL BURROW ENTRY AND PASSAGEWAYS, PEST NESTS, HOLES, GAPS OR CRACKS IN WALLS, CEILINGS, FLOORS, FIXING LEAKS AND MANAGING GARBAGE IN PUBLIC AREAS. EVIDENC
